# Template Checksums
# Format: <template-version> <sha256-hash> <file-size>
# Generated: 2026-05-30
#
# This file contains SHA256 checksums for template release archives.
# Each release template-vX.Y.Z corresponds to a git tag of the same name.
# Checksums are generated by the CI/CD pipeline when a template release is created.
#
# To verify: sha256sum workspace.zip | awk '{print $1}'
#
# Available template versions:
# - template-v0.5.0 (current)
#
# Note: Checksums for future versions will be added here by CI/CD.
